dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Macro voted bullish on overnight gap-up +$1.17 and zero macro events, but the gap-up test was already failing in premarket (-$1.62 from PMH 671.63), and both technical (CHOP ribbon 16c, mixed bars) and internals (XLK -0.59% vs XLF +0.56% tug-of-war) see no directional conviction.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: Macro is anchoring to the overnight gap-up number and ignoring the real-time PMH rejection (-$1.62 from 671.63); this intraday invalidation of the bullish thesis is being systematically underweighted.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY breaks above and holds PMH 671.63 with BULL ribbon spread ≥20c within first 30 min of RTH — proves gap-up is structural, premarket reversal was profit-taking, macro thesis reasserts.

primary.condition: if SPY breaks below PML 669.93 with ribbon confirming BEAR stack ≥20c separation

secondary.condition: if SPY reclaims and closes above PMH 671.63 with BULL ribbon ≥20c — gap-up thesis resumes

swarm_predictions.claim: PMH 671.63 acts as RTH resistance cap; SPY fails to close a 5m bar above 671.63 within the first 60 min of RTH
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5m bar above 671.63 with BULL ribbon spread ≥20c before 10:30 ET

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains above 16.50 through the first hour of RTH, sustaining mild risk-off tone and preventing clean bullish momentum from the overnight gap
5m ribbon does not achieve clean BULL stack (≥20c spread) before 10:30 ET; price oscillates in chop zone between PML 669.93 and PMH 671.63
swarm_predictions.invalidation: 5m ribbon spread reaches ≥20c BULL stack within first 3 RTH bars (by 10:00 ET)

synthesis_narrative: The key tension today is macro's bullish overnight-gap thesis (+$1.17 gap, zero events) versus real-time premarket price rejection (-$1.62 from PMH 671.63), a MIXED ribbon at only 16c spread (clean threshold: 20c+), and XLK underperformance (-0.59% vs XLF +0.56% — a tug-of-war, not risk-on rotation). With level_thesis data unavailable, only 1 of 3 specialists voted directionally, validator flags weak robustness with a bearish devil's advocate lean, and post-adjustment confidence collapses to -26 — triggering the NO_TRADE gate. The single most important watch at open: whether PMH 671.63 holds as resistance (bearish scenario → gap-fill path toward prior-day low 668.17) or SPY breaks cleanly above it with BULL ribbon ≥20c (macro thesis reasserts, chop resolves bullish).

technical.one_line: CHOP — MIXED ribbon 16c (sub-20c threshold); price at pivot 670.00 with zero separation; gap-up bullish edge lost on -$1.62 premarket reversal from PMH

macro.one_line: Gap-up +$1.17 with zero macro events; VIX 16.98 rising mildly (+1.92%, +0.33pt); risk-on backdrop but intraday reversal undermines the dominant-gap thesis
